title: Files, Descriptors, Locks, and RAII-Like C Patterns
description: A service reload path owns heap buffers, FILE streams, descriptors, sockets, and mutexes across cancellation and errors. Learners cumulatively produce uniform resource-lifetime wrapper through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Model external handles as scarce lifetime-bound resources even when their storage is not heap memory.
Pair acquisition with one idempotent or guarded release operation and a valid empty state.
Use compiler cleanup attributes only behind a documented extension boundary with equivalent standard-C control flow.
